Run History

Scheduler Settings
Professional configuration for the job scheduling engine
⚡ Execution
Maximum goroutines running jobs simultaneously
0 = no timeout. Applied to all jobs unless overridden per-job
IANA timezone name for cron schedule interpretation
Singleton Mode
Prevent overlapping runs of the same job
🛑 Globally Pause Scheduler
Stop all job execution without disabling individual jobs
🔁 Retry Policy
Maximum retry attempts per failed job
How to calculate delay between retries
Base delay; multiplied by backoff strategy
📬 Queue & Dead-Letter Queue
Number of async queue consumer goroutines
Enable Dead-Letter Queue
Send permanently failed jobs to DLQ for inspection
604800 = 7 days. How long DLQ entries are retained
📋 Logging & Maintenance
Days to keep job_runs records in the database
How often the scheduler logs a heartbeat
Scheduler Operations
Create New Job
Common: */5 * * * * (5m) · 0 * * * * (hourly) · 0 0 * * * (daily) · 0 0 * * 0 (weekly)
How often the job runs (in seconds)
Job-specific configuration passed to the executor
Enabled
Singleton Mode
Job Details
